title: cyrtandra kealiae subsp. kealiae
intro: Cyrtandra kealiae subsp. kealiae, also known as the Kealia cyrtandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, endemic to the island of Kauai in Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyrtandra kealiae subsp. kealiae include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional Hawaiian herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or poultices, although modern research is limited, and more studies are needed to confirm its effectiveness.
